Explanation: Using selectFrom(ACTIONS) fetches all columns from the ACTIONS table, even though only specific columns are needed. Replace with an explicit select statement like dsl.select(ACTIONS.ACTION_ID, ACTIONS.MEMBER_ID, ACTIONS.ITEM_ID, ACTIONS.TIMESTAMP).from(ACTIONS) to fetch only the required columns.

Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the RECOMMENDATIONS table, which may retrieve unnecessary data. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed for the Recommendation mapping.
